target_user: Legal/Compliance Teams, AI Governance Officers ensuring adherence to the EU AI Act.
monetization: Enterprise licensing, regulatory update subscriptions, audit log storage.
reason: Anticipation of the EU AI Act's phased implementation is creating urgent demand for tools that interpret and enforce its guidelines on AI context.

target_user: AI Researchers, Multi-Modal App Developers building applications combining vision, audio, text inputs.
reason: Newer, more capable multi-modal models are driving demand for unified context management across various input types.

target_user: AI Engineers, Solution Architects building complex agentic systems (AutoGen, CrewAI).
reason: Maturation of multi-agent frameworks is driving demand for robust, shared context orchestration across interacting AI agents.

reason: Major developer conferences (e.g., Google I/O, Microsoft Build) in late April/early May create urgent demand for context-aware assistants.
